diagrams.title: Virtual Address Translation in Paging
diagrams.description: Shows how a virtual address is translated to physical address using page table
elements: Page Table Entry (Frame Number + Control Bits)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding address translation mechanism in paging systems

diagrams.title: Page Replacement Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision tree for handling a page fault when all frames are occupied
elements: If page is dirty, write to disk
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the page replacement decision process

diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy and Management
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between CPU registers, TLB, cache, main memory, and disk in memory management
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where different memory management components fit in the system hierarchy

diagrams.title: Thrashing Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between degree of multiprogramming and CPU utilization, illustrating the thrashing point
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how thrashing affects system performance
